prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-EOESPTC-2P-RD Product Type: TENT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Essential Survival Red Pop Tent Canopy for Hiking Camping Emergency Description: This is the ideal light weight tent for survival and emergency situations, and it's also great for when a regular canopy tent is too much equipment to carry.

The lightweight and portability of this unit allows the user to move freely among nature and set up camp at a moments notice. The included 25 feet of nylon rope allows easy set up between two trees or large boulders that can be found nearly anywhere in the wilderness.

The open design allows for direct air flow through the tent on hot and humid nights. The bright red color will ensure that you can easily find your tent. Search Terms: hiking gear backpacking accesories camping supplies emergency survival kit Features: - Dimensions: 8' x 6' - Water Resistant & Durable - 2.5 Mil Thick Polyethylene - Fire Retardant - Fits up to 2 People === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8' x 6' Red Pop Tent Canopy

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8x6-ft Red Pop Tent Canopy

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight Survival Tent, Water Resistant, Fits 2 People, Fire Retardant, Includes 25 Feet Rope

openai.title_differentiation: Water Resistant, Fire Retardant, Lightweight, 2-Person, 25-Ft Rope, Easy Tree Setup, Emergency Shelter
